pages.text: &6Plaster&r and painted &6trim&r are not blocks — they are decoration layers applied to the face of an existing block. Because they sit flush on the surface, the cell next to the wall stays free for torches, storage, or a doorway.

Right-click a face with the plaster item to coat it (sneak-right-click to strip it off). Use the paint brush, with a dye in your off hand, to stamp a colored trim shape on top; the brush sneak-cycles through shapes including None to remove.
Decoration is not just looks. Plaster and trim raise a home's or workshop's &6appeal&r, which makes citizens more comfortable, and plaster also hardens a wall against blasts and breakage.
